classifications.label: BIL 0 – UNOFFICIAL
classifications.def: Not created in the course of official duties. No damage if disclosed.

classifications.label: BIL 1 – OFFICIAL
classifications.def: Routine business information. No or insignificant damage if disclosed.

classifications.label: BIL 2 – OFFICIAL: Sensitive (Default)
classifications.def: Sensitive information requiring extra handling. Limited damage to individuals or the organisation if compromised.

classifications.label: BIL 3 – SENSITIVE
classifications.def: Damage to the interests of the Organisation, or individuals.

classifications.label: BIL 4 – CONFIDENTIAL
classifications.def: Severe damage to the interests of the Organisation, or individuals.

classifications.label: BIL 5 – PROTECTED
classifications.def: Exceptionally grave damage to the interests of the Organisation, or individuals.

disclaimers.default: This email is intended for the named recipient only. If you received it in error, please notify the sender and delete it.
disclaimers.explicit: This email may contain sensitive, confidential, or controlled information. It is provided strictly for the intended recipient and for authorised purposes only. Unauthorised access, disclosure, copying, distribution, or use of the information contained in this communication is prohibited and may be unlawful. If you are not the intended recipient, you must notify the sender immediately and permanently delete this email and any attachments. Any handling of sensitive information must comply with applicable Australian law and relevant organisational security requirements.

security.restrictionMessage: This extension requires an organisation token. Please contact your IT administrator.
